title: Clear Spyglass
body:
## 🔍 Clear Spyglass

Clear Spyglass keeps the original spyglass frame while making the inner “glass” fully transparent.  
This gives you a clean, unobstructed view when zooming, without removing the iconic spyglass look.

### ✨ Features
- Keeps the vanilla spyglass frame
- Makes the inner glass area completely transparent

### 🎯 Why Use It? 
This pack keeps the aesthetic charm of the spyglass while letting you see everything clearly.

### 🧩 Compatibility
- Minecraft Java 1.20.2+
